description_long: This is a compact, armored combat tactical vehicle with a faceted, angular hull and a small, open-topped turret. The exterior is painted in a military green with visible weathering and scuff marks, suggesting heavy use. The vehicle features four rugged wheels with pronounced tread, a spare tire mounted at the rear, and a sloped front for deflecting impacts. There are visible hatches, periscopes, and a mounted machine gun on the side, indicating its combat readiness. The armor plating covers the entire body, with sloped surfaces for increased protection. The vehicle's utilitarian design is optimized for urban and tactical operations, providing both mobility and protection for its occupants.
description: A compact, green armored combat vehicle with a small turret, rugged wheels, and visible weathering. Features include full-body sloped armor, a side-mounted machine gun, and a rear spare tire.
description_view_0: Front view shows the sloped armored nose, central wheel, and angular hull with a prominent spare tire on the back.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the side-mounted machine gun, angular armor panels, and rugged wheels with visible tread.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the spare tire, rear armor plating, and two rear wheels, with some utility hatches visible.
description_view_3: Right side view reveals the turret opening, side armor, and additional details of the wheel tread and hull geometry.
attribute_weapon_mounts: One visible machine gun mount on the left side of the hull, adjacent to the turret opening.
attribute_armor_plating: Full-body sloped steel armor plating, moderate thickness, covering all sides including the turret and doors. The armor is faceted for deflection and shows signs of wear.
attribute_camouflage_pattern: Solid military green paint with irregular white and gray weathering and scuff marks; no distinct camouflage pattern.
attribute_tire_type: Four rugged, off-road tires with deep tread pattern; one spare tire mounted at the rear.
